title: Dogfood Apply V2 Review
summary: Review the workflow apply v2 declared phases/gates patch before it lands.
goal: Check the current uncommitted workflow-skill patch for correctness, state-schema coherence, and test coverage.

decisions.title: Use workflow apply for the review gate
decisions.rationale: The task is explicitly dogfooding file-backed workflow launch instead of manual phase setup.

phases.name: review
phases.title: Review
phases.goal: Review the current patch and return concrete findings.

gates.name: review-fix
gates.requires: All actionable review findings are addressed or explicitly waived.

jobs.name: apply-v2-review
jobs.prompt: You are reviewing an uncommitted patch in /home/xertrov/.llm-general/ai-coding/codex/skills/workflow. Focus only on the workflow apply v2 declared phases/gates changes. Inspect scripts/workflow_apply.py, scripts/workflow_plan.py, scripts/workflow_run_codex.py, tests/test_workflow.py, and any related docs if relevant. Do not edit files. Return PASS if there are no actionable correctness/test/doc issues. Otherwise return FAIL with findings using file paths and line references. Pay special attention to whether workflow-plan phases/gates/decisions are preserved honestly in run state, whether worker phase status updates still work for normal workflow run, and whether completion/check semantics are not faked.
